title: Automatic public webhook via cloudflared quick-tunnel

preflight.note: Created before adding the tunnel manager, Twilio webhook auto-config, main-process wiring, and packaging changes.

acceptance_criteria.text: A tunnel manager resolves a cloudflared binary (cached under user data, fetched once if absent), starts a quick tunnel to the local service, and parses the public https URL from cloudflared output; URL parsing is unit-tested.

When credentials validate and no manual public webhook URL is set, the app sets the Twilio number's SMS webhook to <tunnel>/webhooks/sms via the Twilio API; the request shaping is unit-tested with a mocked fetch.
The tunnel and webhook are (re)provisioned on each start because quick-tunnel URLs are ephemeral, and the tunnel process is stopped on app quit / stop-service.

Inbound stays private-first: the tunnel only forwards to loopback, a manual public webhook URL still overrides automatic provisioning, and no secrets are logged. Renderer/backend unit suites pass and the installed 014 build launches cleanly; end-to-end inbound delivery is exercised when the operator connects Twilio.
